headlines: Coinbase wins conditional OCC national trust charter (Apr 2, 2026)
JPMorgan: institutional crypto flows plunged in Q1 2026
U.S. spot Bitcoin & Ethereum ETFs posted net outflows on April 3, 2026
Binance adds oil & natural-gas perpetual futures, expanding into commodities
Tether hires a Big Four firm for its first full USDT financial audit (March 2026 filings/news )

articles.title: Coinbase receives conditional approval for a national trust company charter (Apr 2, 2026)
articles.summary: The Office of the Comptroller of the Currency gave Coinbase conditional approval to form a federally chartered national trust company on April 2, 2026 — a major step that would let the exchange expand custody and bank-like services once pre‑opening conditions are met. This move drew immediate pushback from bank lobby groups that warned of consumer and safety concerns.
articles.source: Benzinga / Independent Community Bankers of America (ICBA)

articles.title: JPMorgan: crypto investment flows fell to $11B in Q1 2026
articles.summary: JPMorgan research reported a sharp slowdown in crypto investment flows during Q1 2026, with total flows roughly $11 billion — about one‑third of the prior year — signalling weaker institutional net demand early in 2026.

articles.title: Spot Bitcoin & Ethereum ETFs saw net outflows on April 3, 2026
articles.summary: Data providers showed U.S. spot Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs recorded net outflows on April 3, 2026, as risk‑off macro headlines and reduced ETF creation activity pressured short‑term demand for both BTC and ETH exposure.

articles.title: Binance launches oil and natural‑gas perpetual futures (late Mar–Apr 2026)
articles.summary: Binance expanded its derivatives suite by listing perpetual futures tied to major energy commodities (WTI, Brent and natural gas), giving crypto traders 24/7 exposure to oil and gas prices and signalling exchanges’ growing push into real‑world commodity derivatives.

articles.title: Tether engages a Big Four firm for a full USDT financial audit (March 2026 reports)
articles.summary: Tether confirmed it retained a Big Four accounting firm to perform its first full financial statement audit of USDT reserves, a milestone that aims to close long‑standing transparency questions about the world's largest stablecoin.

articles.title: Morgan Stanley files ultra‑low fee spot Bitcoin ETF (0.14%)
articles.summary: Morgan Stanley filed paperwork for a spot Bitcoin ETF with a 0.14% fee, positioning the bank to offer one of the cheapest U.S. Bitcoin ETFs and signalling more traditional asset managers are moving into spot crypto products.

articles.title: U.S. Treasury starts GENIUS Act implementation with a proposed rulemaking (early April 2026)
articles.summary: The U.S. Treasury published a notice of proposed rulemaking to begin implementing the GENIUS Act stablecoin framework — the first formal step to shape how payment stablecoins will be regulated and licensed in the U.S.

articles.title: Blur (BLUR) monthly token unlock pumps new supply to market (April 3, 2026)
articles.summary: Blur executed a scheduled token unlock on April 3, 2026, moving a large tranche of BLUR tokens (reported in the hundreds of millions in nominal USD) to Coinbase Prime — a supply event that can weigh on price and trading sentiment for the NFT‑market focused token.
